title: Effect Randomizer
description: Datapack that recreates SmallAnt's Effect Randomizer challenge.
body:
## Effect Randomizer

This Data Pack recreates the SmallAnt Effect Randomizer Challenge!   

It gives you a random effect (except for instant damage and instant health) for 60 seconds, every 20 seconds, from level 1-10. 

There is a 20 second grace period upon spawning into the world.

Shout out to tjthings and Eulerian for also making a data pack like this.
